entities.name: 客户流失率 (churn)
entities.how_described: 本集指出流失率是增长的最大杀手，并推导出一个反直觉规律：流失量按总客户量的百分比计算，随着公司规模变大，流失客户的绝对增长迟早会超过营销获客，从而拖累增长并形成「绝对规模天花板」

entities.name: NRR
entities.how_described: 本集将它作为诊断框架的第三步，指出若 NRR 大于 100% 才能抵消流失做大公司；但同时也提出反直觉警示——因为基数（logo 数）流失时，剩下的老客户再怎么升级套餐也很难填补窟窿，不能被漂亮的 NRR 掩盖了大批客户逃离的事实

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And so NRR does not include that, and therefore, it actually undercounts what's going on in a bad way, in a way that hurts you.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: This is why NRR isn't quite right, because NRR is saying that a loss of 20% from cancellations is offset by 20% from upgrades.

evidence.quote: So this is why, again, I believe in NRR.

entities.name: 渠道饱和 (channel saturation)
entities.how_described: 本集说所有获客和营销渠道最终都会走平甚至开始衰退（即所谓的大象曲线），在渠道打满后，指望靠加个小功能让投放团队继续死磕原有渠道是没用的，必须去探索全新的获客模式

evidence.quote: So just to summarize, logo retention, pricing, NRR, marketing, channel saturation.

entities.name: 入职引导 (onboarding)
entities.how_described: 本集说如果实在不知道怎么降低流失率，去优化新手引导往往是投入产出比最高的切入点，因为绝大多数流失发生在使用的第一天或前 90 天，在这里做微小改变能对最终的取消率产生巨大影响

evidence.quote: Then they went through onboarding and invested their time, et cetera, et cetera.

evidence.quote: ... because if you don't know what to do, or all else being equal, then focus on onboarding.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And also, small changes in the onboarding can have large effects on cancellation, whereas later on, that's not necessarily true.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So if you can do a little bit in the onboarding or shift the onboarding percentage a little bit, it pays off enormously in revenue and profit over time by making them successful.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So again, if you don't know what to do, onboarding is a good bet, and even if you do know what to do, I'll still bet that onboarding is a good bet for where to go.

evidence.quote: And then the final step just to close this out is onboarding, work on onboarding activation.

entities.name: 大象曲线 (elephant curve)
entities.how_described: 本集用来描述营销渠道的生命周期，说它其实不像传统观点认为的 S 型曲线那样永远上升，而是随着时间推移、受众看腻了广告、平台算法变更，效能最终会衰退，甚至出现「屁股下垂」的现象

evidence.quote: And even if it did stop growing, and just stayed flat, and doesn't become an elephant curve, that'd be incredible.

entities.name: 营销漏斗 (marketing funnel)
entities.how_described: 本集将增长停滞的诊断框架比喻为营销漏斗：必须按顺序排查流失、定价、留存和渠道，如果第一层漏水，修补底部的缝隙是没用的，必须按顺序排查并修复最大的问题

evidence.quote: Just like if, I don't know, maybe if you had a marketing funnel and there's a step where everything falls apart and you're like, "Well, I'll just tune the bottom of it a little."

entities.name: A/B 测试 (A/B testing)
entities.how_described: 在节目最后的「逆向思考」环节，嘉宾提出大多数人相信但他不信的观点：A/B 测试效果并不好，它无法用于战略或愿景等真正重要的事，且绝大多数测试出的细节结果其实都是统计学上的假阳性

evidence.quote: A/B testing doesn't work very well and it doesn't work on most things.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Even if the tool's 95% accurate, when the thing you're looking for is rare, which it is in the case of A/B testing, the false positives happen more often than the actual thing happens.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So as a result, this isn't true of all A/B testing, but for what most people do when they just do the mundane A/B testing, you can't A/B test the important things and the details are mostly false positives, so it's an enormous waste of time unless you're incredibly sophisticated.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: If you don't have all of this information and knowledge about A/B testing, then you're the patsy.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I will just say that I have found A/B testing useful in my career.

entities.name: B2B
entities.how_described: 本集提及 B2B 与面向消费者的产品在定价、净留存（NRR）机制上的差异，指出在 B2B 领域，随着客户公司规模扩大自然涨价更容易，而在消费级产品则更依赖转介绍和花样繁多的虚拟道具

entities.name: HubSpot

entities.name: Duolingo
entities.how_described: 本集将其作为消费级产品提升净留存（NRR）的正面案例，指出它通过推出各种花里胡哨的皮肤、道具，成功让消费者为了这些额外价值不断掏钱

evidence.quote: Product, design, and research teams at companies like Amazon and Duolingo are already using Strella for Figma prototype testing, concept validation, and customer journey research, getting insights overnight instead of waiting for the next sprint.

evidence.quote: And I was thinking as we were talking about consumer NRR, if you look at Duolingo, they've done a great job here.

entities.name: Hidden Multipliers

evidence.quote: It's called Hidden Multipliers.

entities.name: Buffer
entities.how_described: 本集将其作为公司文化与战略选择的案例，指出它本可以走向高端市场把社交媒体工具卖给大企业，但出于「我们是为小人物服务」的公司定位与自我认同，主动选择不这么做

evidence.quote: We are a company... Like Buffer's a great example.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Buffer could go up-market and try to sell social media tools to whatever, but they realized, "We are a company for the little people.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 37Signals
entities.how_described: 本集将其作为自力更生型公司的代表，指出当它们碰到增长上限时，可以理直气壮地不再追求收入增长，而是选择将利润最大化，每年安安稳稳分红，这也是一种成功

evidence.quote: And so this is a company like 37Signals or really lots of bootstrap companies who have hit some sort of limit and realize, "That's okay.
